name: tpl-sales-proposal
description: Research prospect, draft full proposal, route through internal approval, then send for signature or flag revisions

steps.prompt: Research the company {{prospect_name}} (website: {{prospect_url}}) for a sales proposal. Produce a structured intelligence brief with: (1) 'Company Overview' — size, industry, key products/services (3-4 sentences); (2) 'Pain Points' — 3-5 likely business challenges that {{product_tier}} could address, based on their public positioning; (3) 'Competitive Context' — who they likely use today and what gaps exist; (4) 'Key Stakeholders' — likely decision-maker titles for a {{deal_size}} deal. Be specific and actionable — AE {{ae_name}} will use this to write a proposal.

Write a complete sales proposal for {{prospect_name}} based on the research brief below. AE: {{ae_name}}. Deal size: {{deal_size}}. Product tier: {{product_tier}}. Pricing: {{pricing}}.

Research brief:
{{steps.research-prospect.output}}

The proposal must include these sections:
1. Executive Summary (100 words max) — why this deal makes sense now
2. Understanding Your Challenges — mirror their pain points from the research
3. Our Solution — how {{product_tier}} addresses each pain point specifically
4. ROI & Business Case — a concrete estimate with numbers where possible
5. Pricing & Terms — present {{pricing}} clearly
6. Next Steps — single clear CTA with timeline

Tone: authoritative but collaborative. No fluff. Target 600-800 words total.

steps.notifyMsg: Deal won! {{prospect_name}} signed the proposal. AE: {{ae_name}} | Deal size: {{deal_size}} | Product: {{product_tier}} | Envelope: {{steps.send-for-signature.output.envelope_id}}
Proposal for {{prospect_name}} requires revisions before sending. AE: {{ae_name}} | Decision: {{steps.internal-approval.output.decision}} | Reviewer notes: {{steps.internal-approval.output.notes}}
